home.title: ARUNDO - Your path to trophy fishing
home.description: Plan your trips, discover waters, track catches and keep your best fishing stories in one place.

features.title: Smart map of Ukrainian waters
features.description: Find fishing spots, view markers and orient yourself on the terrain quickly.

features.title: Fish and water encyclopedia
features.description: A reference with filters, species characteristics and practical tips for anglers.

features.title: Catch statistics
features.description: Analyze trip counts, catches by period and your most successful sessions.

features.title: Profile, photos and awards
features.description: Store your best photos, track achievements and build your fishing history.

profile.label: Profile
profile.heading: Your profile, photos and fishing achievements
profile.emptyFavoriteDescription: You do not have a favorite place yet. Go to the Encyclopedia to choose the best water body.

auth.nameRequired: Enter your name to create an account.

settings.title: General settings
settings.themeCardTitle: Choose a light or dark theme
settings.lightThemeDescription: Bright surfaces, a clean background and more breathing room.
settings.darkThemeDescription: Deep backgrounds, soft contrast and a comfortable evening view.
settings.languageCardTitle: Pick a language from the scroll list

map.label: Map
map.title: Choose a fishing spot and open point details
map.description: An interactive map of waters with active markers, popups and quick switching between popular locations.
map.nearbyEmpty: Tap the geolocation button to see waters near you.
map.activePointDescription: The selected water body is highlighted on the map and the sidebar updates with your choice.
map.hint: Tap markers to switch water bodies
map.locationReady: The browser will ask for permission to show your location.
map.locationSuccess: Your location is shown on the map.
map.locationDenied: Could not access geolocation. Check browser permissions.
map.locationUnsupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
map.quickDescription: Switch between popular locations and open nearby water bodies for a trip.
map.locationApprox: Current location based on browser data.
map.nearbyWithin: Showing waters within 50 km of you.
map.noNearbySpots: No nearby waters found. Try again or switch to the map.
map.currentLocationBrowser: Current location based on browser data.

wiki.label: Encyclopedia
wiki.title: Fish species, filters and detailed reference
wiki.description: A two-column layout: filters on the left, species catalog on the right in either list or detail mode.
wiki.filterDescription: Narrow search by water type, target fish and size.
wiki.feedingFallback: Bottom organisms, larvae, plant-based feed and dedicated bait mixes.

stats.label: Statistics
stats.title: Catches, routes and best fishing sessions
stats.description: An overview of recent trips, total catch count and the most successful species in a clean analytics panel.
stats.recentTripsDescription: Review the latest spots and jump back to the map quickly.
stats.emptyTitle: Your statistics will appear here. Add your first catch
stats.emptyDescription: Save the first catch and this page will show recent trips, total catches, biggest fish and success by species.
stats.addCatchHint: Start with your first catch entry
stats.formDescription: Add one fishing trip and the dashboard will update automatically.
stats.optionalHint: Optional - leave blank if there was no trophy.
stats.emptyWeightHint: Leave blank if there is no trophy.
stats.confirmClearDescription: All catch records will be removed and cannot be restored.
stats.confirmDeleteDescription: This catch record will be removed and cannot be restored.
